title: stipa jarava
intro: Stipa jarava, also known as Jarava or Quenua, is a type of grass native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stipa jarava include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular remedy among locals. The herbal preparations of Stipa jarava include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by boiling the plant's leaves and stems in water or mixing its dried leaves with other herbs.
